title: Wireshark Lua dissector for LICHEN link frames
description: Write a Wireshark Lua dissector plugin (lichen.lua) that decodes LICHEN link-layer frames captured over UDP/serial. Fields: Length, LLSec byte (Encrypted/Sig/MIClen/AddrMode), Epoch, SeqNum, DstAddr (variable width per AddrMode), SCHC payload, MIC. Should work with DLT_USER captures from the simulator.
close_reason: Full link-frame dissector written (LLSec, Epoch, SeqNum, Addr, SCHC, MIC) and pcap.py docstring corrected
